title: phacelia neomexicana var. alba
intro: Phacelia neomexicana var. alba is a white-flowering variant of the Phacelia neomexicana plant, a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Phacelia neomexicana var. alba can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate colds and flu.
